summary: AI delivery layer for SAP migrations, Fit-Gap work, and post-go-live change requests.
editor_note: SAP migrations usually turn expert memory into workshop debris; this treats the delivery method itself as software. The product maps ECC documents, transcripts, Z-objects, Fit-Gap decisions, RICEFW stories, and hypercare tickets into Activate-phase agents. The bet is not another copilot beside SAP, but a project memory that survives consultants. The risk is whether its claimed 40-45% speed gains hold beyond early enterprise pilots.

product_evidence.claim: The official homepage positions Qorelo as an AI engine for modern SAP delivery and says it stays embedded through discovery, fit-to-standard, build, cutover, and hypercare.
The product copy says Qorelo ingests ECC enhancement documents, functional specs, Z-object registers, historical BRDs, and transcripts into a queryable migration knowledge base.
The site describes Fit-Gap and build outputs including RICEFW-classified user stories, configuration guides, Fit-Gap logs, Jira tickets, and hypercare change-request handling.
The funding report says the company is using seed capital to expand its SAP migration automation product after early enterprise pilots.

market_context.primary_user: SAP program leads, transformation offices, systems integrators, and enterprise IT teams running ECC-to-S/4HANA migrations.
market_context.differentiation: Qorelo focuses on the SAP delivery method itself, turning implementation artifacts and workshop output into agents for Fit-Gap, RICEFW, Jira, Confluence, Miro, and hypercare workflows.
market_context.why_now: Large enterprises face S/4HANA migration pressure while specialist SAP delivery capacity remains expensive, making reusable migration memory more valuable.

risks.claim: The open question is whether Qorelo's claimed speed improvements repeat outside early SAP migration pilots and across more heterogeneous integrator delivery teams.
risks.basis: VentureDex editorial assessment based on official product evidence and current seed funding coverage.
